parameters.text:
=⚠️ *PROACTIVE NETWORK ALERT* ⚠️

Hi {{$json.name}},

Our automated Sentinel system has detected a minor signal degradation at the macro-cell tower servicing your area (`{{$json.location}}`).

🛠️ Our L2 Engineering team has already been dispatched. You do not need to call or text support!

🎁 **Compensation Applied:** To keep you connected, we have auto-credited **2GB of high-speed 5G data** to your mobile plan, completely free of charge.

Thank you for choosing us!

=🚨 **AUTO-MITIGATION DEPLOYED** 🚨

**Outage Location:** {{$json.alert.location}}
**Severity:** {{$json.alert.severity}}

🤖 **Zero-Touch Action Taken:**
- 12,400 customers in the affected sector have been sent proactive apologies.
- 2GB data waivers automatically credited to bypass call-center flooding.

Expected L1 Call Deflection: 94%
